overview: I tested Anthropic's advisor tool on my SAFe Feature Spec System, ran a full golden set, and found it averaged -2.2 points at 4.3× cost ($4.98 vs $1.17). Rest of week: PostgreSQL migration, governance wiring, connector abstraction, and Streamlit Cloud deploy.

keyPoints.title: Advisor tool scored -2.2 pts avg at 4.3× cost
Governance modules were built but unconnected until now
Connector abstraction replaced fragile single-tool Notion dependency
PostgreSQL migration unlocked Streamlit Cloud deployment
Live deploy scored 76→85, $0.72, 27 calls across 5 agents
